mechanism_narrative: A flat federal funds rate below 2% with CPI inflation still elevated indicates the Fed is behind the curve, so bond traders price faster future tightening and the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle disinflation risk with policy normalization
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL growth decelerates for two consecutive monthly prints while FEDFUNDS is unchanged and the 10-year yield falls or stays flat in most 20-day windows after the signal.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment falls below 4.5% and payroll growth remains positive, markets infer tighter labor conditions and stronger nominal demand, which lifts near-term rate expectations and pushes the 10-year yield higher.
failure_condition: Reject if, after the trigger, the 10-year yield declines on average over the next 20 trading days or if low-UNRATE/positive-PAYEMS episodes do not outperform unconditional yield direction.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in retail sales signals weakening household demand and lower future inflation pressure, so investors bid up Treasuries and the 10-year yield falls over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines for 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive RSAFS declines are followed by rising 10-year yields in more than 60% of cases or if the average 20-day yield change is positive after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in industrial production indicates improving real activity and stronger cyclical pricing power, which raises expected growth and inflation and pushes the 10-year yield higher over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if a 3-month upward trend in INDPRO is not associated with a higher average 60-day 10-year yield change than periods with flat or falling INDPRO.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts break above their recent 6-month trend, stronger construction activity signals firmer domestic demand and higher inflation-sensitive growth, which lifts the 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakouts are not followed by positive average 20-day yield changes or if yield direction is negative in a majority of breakout episodes.

mechanism_narrative: If CPI inflation accelerates while the policy rate remains unchanged, real rates compress and the market prices a more hawkish Fed path, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise within 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth rises while FEDFUNDS is unchanged
regime_hint: inflation surprise within an unchanged policy stance
failure_condition: Reject if inflation accelerations without a FedFunds change do not precede higher 10-year yields, or if the average 20-day yield change is non-positive across triggered episodes.

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle, a rising unemployment rate after prior labor-market softness signals recession risk and future policy easing, which drives the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 0.3pp UNRATE increases during tightening cycles are followed by flat or rising 10-year yields more often than falling yields, or if the 60-day average yield change is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A broad slowdown with falling GDP, weaker payrolls, and softer retail sales signals lower nominal growth and weaker term premiums, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous weakness in GDP, payrolls, and retail sales does not produce lower 10-year yields over 20 trading days, or if the signal loses directional accuracy below 50% in rolling out-of-sample tests.
